%% THIS TEST SESSION CRASHED %%

Patch Set 1:

Hm, why is removing extent get for read locks the right answer here?  I see your comment about multiple read locks but I don't see the connection to the crash in LU-17663.  Removing extent get for read seems like the wrong answer.

Also, btw: I wrote a patch to simplify this code a little while ago.  It is part of a long series, but doesn't have to be (it was needed for a later patch in the series):
https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/54196

commit.subject: LU-17663 osc: extent find only care for write
commit.message:
LU-17663 osc: extent find only care for write

Don't use read lock in extent, read with different regions have
different compatible read locks.

Fixes: 67aca1fcc6 ("LU-16160 osc: take ldlm lock when queue sync pages")
Signed-off-by: Bobi Jam <bobijam@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Iceb05eb22744debc2e8122ef3ee451d149d79195
